programs.title: Bloomberg Open Interest
programs.desc: Delivering the market-moving news anyone needs to know to get a jump start on the U.S. trading day.

programs.title: Bloomberg Tech
programs.desc: Bloomberg Tech is the only daily live technology program with a focus on breaking news, market-moving reporting and analysis of global technology companies and stories. The program brings the audience interviews from the biggest names in the business, offering in-depth analysis and critical insights.

programs.title: Bloomberg Deals
programs.desc: A weekly, midday program that delivers high-impact, editorially driven coverage of the most important corporate transactions shaping the market. With a mix of original Bloomberg reporting, market data, guest analysis, and Bloomberg Intelligence.

programs.title: Bloomberg: Balance of Power
programs.desc: "Bloomberg Balance of Power" with host David Westin is a daily look at how politics is impacting global business decisions; top lawmakers, business executives and government leaders join to discuss doing business in today's volatile political climate.

programs.title: Bloomberg: The Close
programs.desc: Romaine Bostick and Katie Greifeld break down the day's top market-moving stories and trading action around the closing bell.

programs.desc: "Bloomberg Balance of Power" with host David Westin is a daily look at how politics is impacting global business decisions; top lawmakers, business executives and government leaders join to discuss doing business in today's volatile political climate.
